description: Black Power is a prominent New Zealand gang founded in 1970 by Reitu Harris in Wellington. Members are predominantly Māori and Pasifika. The gang is heavily involved in organized crime, including drug manufacturing and dealing, and has a presence in New Zealand, Australia, and Bali.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Black Power gang also has a strong presence on the Gold Coast of Queensland in Australia.
country_links.context: The Black Power gang has a strong presence on the Gold Coast of Queensland in Australia.
The gang has territory in Bali, Indonesia.
